original_abstract: Numerous scientific disciplines have achieved significant breakthroughs by adopting online platforms that organize, structure, and mine complex data typically too granular for traditional journal publication. In this paper, we introduce OpenML, an open-science platform designed for machine learning researchers to share and organize their research artifacts in exhaustive detail. By streamlining the exchange of data and results, OpenML enables researchers to work more efficiently, increase their professional visibility, and collaborate globally to tackle increasingly complex challenges. We explore how OpenML fits into the broader landscape of networked science and outline the tangible benefits it offers to the machine learning community, including researchers, students, and industry practitioners.
humanized_abstract: Data from many fields of science have become manageable for data-intensive analyses by being stored and indexed in online databases. In this paper we describe the Open Machine Learning platform, OpenML, a repository where machine learning researchers can share and link their experimental outcomes in exquisite detail. OpenML increases the speed, visibility and globalness of the development of data analysis methods in machine learning and facilitates progress towards very large-scale analyses of data. We describe OpenML and its potential contributions to network science as well as its direct benefits for machine learning as a research, educational and technological field.
